item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
nutritious
wait what
and?
almost as if these places were named long ago
no weapons
that's unsettling
please
it's nice that there are only 3 types
hi bob
my dudes
what could go wrong?
sure why not
endless entertainment
dangit Superman
obviously
thanks T
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Thursday unhinged meme dump of pure chaos #259
item.description:
1. Yes, Mr. Anderson... COME with us
2. An average day in the life of a plumber
3. Thanks bro
4. Winding her up
5. He thought he could just smile and wag tail and get away with it... Narrator: He did.
6. Do Mortal Kombat and backpipes mix? You be the judge
7. Twerky twerky little frog
8. I'm really curious what he did at the job interview to prove he can do this job
9. How to hold gun in Italy
10. A magnificent shark
11. This messed me up for a sec
12. Futuristic chariot
13
14. Me, when I hear there is more pizza
15. Would you eat some nihilist pancakes? P.S. Thanks to the two people (Hi, Mom and Dad!) who made it to the end of this dump. When I'm not busy making questionable life choices on the internet, I've been pouring my soul into a little passion project. If you got a kick out of this dump, you're going to love my game: "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)." Think "The Stanley Parable" but with even more chaos and quirky characters such this little nihilist pancake. Can you imagine? A first-person game mixed with humor? Anyway, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked out the game and gave it a wishlist. Anyway, that's all for now. Have a great Thursday. If work sucks, refer back to this dump and Imgur
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Game designer: "Do you really know how to animate animals?"Developer: "Trust me"
item.dc:creator: Joxtar

item.title: Oopsies, Ouchies, & Oh Shits! #4 (Weak Willed be Warned)
item.description:
Oopsies
Ouchies
Oh shit!
Welcome to Triple-O, how tough are ya?
If you find that this is your limit then please consider moving to the next post (:
But if you’re still here, then let’s ride!
Take this fuel comrade. You’re going to need it.
MESS WITH COW GET THE OW
Would 100% turn a tent into a portapotty.
Bro heard Grandma say “Hit the gas” and accelerated.
YOU HAD ONE JOB Lmao I just noticed the inflatable says “Fat Boys”
You’d think the weight of his massive balls would throw off his equilibrium.
*dink*
Quentin?
Wear a helmet <3
Guess the “H” stands for “Hell yeah” cause that is clearly Jesus H. Christ.
I bet he said “hold my beer” moments earlier.
*tries to shoot web*
How much could it have hurt? It was a soft drink.
Back to Back World War Champs, ‘Murica!
*windows shut down noise*
This is just tearable.
Diddy: “See you later alligator!” Alligator: “At your trial pxdophile!”
“We’ll Be Right Back!”
There’s still time to turn back…
Not all heroes wear capes.
Reverse Diglett.
What was the plan here?
Instant karma
“I wonder what those holes are fo-“
“Slippery when wet.”
o no :c
Weeeeeee
This is better than sex.
Fus Ro AAAAAAHHHHHH
It was a calculated risk. He’s just bad at math.
Instant karma
When you don’t know the controls yet but you win anyways.
Hans. Get the Flammenwerfer.
Tony Hawks Ice Skater
Gnarly.
I’ll take brains over looks but here I am with neither.
Bro is lucky he didn’t break his neck.
Is it possible to be that close to a live wire and not have your massive brass balls conduct a current?
RIP in peace.
Buy a lotto ticket my mans.
She was horny. The bull was hornier.
You spin me right round baby right round
Car: Wrecked. Pants: Pooped. Driver: Alive. https://www.dailymail.co.uk/video/russia/video-2296240/Video-Driver-miraculously-survives-concrete-bridge-falling-car.html
POV: You all reached the end. I’m proud of you c:
item.dc:creator: trashpanduh

item.title: Hooray!
item.description: I quit drinking a year ago and somehow made it this far. I hope to encourage you, whatever your goal may be. You can do it! Sorry if I misused the penguin. Thanks!

item.description:
Someone liked the Winnebago man from a previous post, so I figured I'd lead with him.
Bush Bahbee lol
Pt 1
Pt 2
Pt 3
Covid Frustrations
Regardless if your football is played in two halves our four quarters, football season is here!!!
Pt 1
Pt 2
God creating of the universe
Reno 911
Check out some of my video dumps! All Sound Dump #1: https://imgur.com/gallery/all-sound-dump-1-jlvZZHd Things Pt 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/0ZNtJ4b Comedy Dump 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/Pthe8TH

item.title: Tag yer posts!
item.description: I understand. Trump bad. Horrible things happening. But if I wanted to see it, I wouldn't have the politics tag blocked! LET ME COME HERE JUST FOR THE FUNNY MEMES, DANG IT!

item.title: Me Pirate Cosplay
item.description: I be more than prepared fer natter like a pirate day :D This has always been one o' me fav'rit cosplays, since it's entirely custom 'n jus' me owns character... I guess I can dub her: The Red Baroness? Happy natter like a pirate day me hearties! (originally posted by @Alsoashley on 2023-09-19 15:18:45)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear
